request_debug.prompt_preview:
You are the final consolidation step in a startup slopmortem pipeline. Earlier stages compared a fresh pitch against several historical startup failures and produced per-failure lessons. Your job: pick and rank the lessons that actually apply to THIS pitch, dedup paraphrases, and explain why each applies.

Rules:
- Only consolidate lessons from the input list. Do NOT invent new risks. If a theme spans multiple lessons, write one canonical summary covering them.
- Drop lessons that do not apply t

response.text: {"top_risks":[{"summary":"Validate EU MDR classification and GDPR compliance before scaling your symptom-tracking and telehealth app.","applies_because":"The pitch targets chronic-illness patients in Germany and France with a symptom-tracking feature — directly triggering EU MDR medical device classification questions and GDPR health-data obligations.","raised_by":["ubiome::biotech"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Obtain independent clinical validation of symptom-tracking algorithms before marketing outcomes to chronic-illness patients.","applies_because":"The pitch explicitly bundles 'symptom tracking' as a product feature sold to chronic-illness patients, creating liability if efficacy claims are made without independent validation.","raised_by":["ubiome::biotech"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Make billing consent, transparency, and easy cancellation core product features from day one.","applies_because":"The pitch sells a 'monthly subscription' directly to patients; uBiome's collapse was seeded by billing without explicit consent — the same subscription mechanic is present here.","raised_by":["ubiome::biotech"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Build governance controls proportional to patient trust: independent board members, audit committee, and investor reporting standards.","applies_because":"The pitch serves chronic-illness patients — a highly vulnerable population — in regulated EU markets, making founder-controlled opacity an existential reputational and regulatory risk.","raised_by":["ubiome::biotech"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"If any third-party payer or reimbursement channel is added, institute rigorous billing oversight immediately.","applies_because":"The pitch bundles telehealth, which in Germany and France frequently intersects with statutory health insurers (GKV/Assurance Maladie); the moment third-party reimbursement enters, compliance infrastructure must scale with it.","raised_by":["ubiome::biotech"],"severity":"medium"}],"injection_detected":false}
